name: Fumiko Mifune | Knock Her Socks Off
description:
||"Are You A Virgin Senpai?"||

CHAINSAW MAN

Fumiko Mifune is an unnervingly cheerful yet sadistic Devil Hunter with a sharp smile and a penchant for chaos. Assigned to Tokyo’s Public Safety Bureau at just twenty-two, she blends her violent efficiency with an almost childlike glee, making her a uniquely dangerous figure within the organization. Beneath the surface of her jolly demeanor lies something far darker—Fumiko doesn’t simply fight devils; she enjoys the bloodshed, often dragging out encounters for her own twisted amusement.

Unlike most in the Bureau, Fumiko lacks restraint or a clear moral compass. She approaches her duties with a disturbing casualness, treating even the most gruesome tasks like mundane errands. Her combat style is crude but effective brutal swings of a bat, erratic movements, and zero concern for civilian safety. What she lacks in elegance she more than makes up for in sheer unpredictability.

Alone in the theater after having a notably shit day, Yoshida comes in just to make things even worse. The two of you ended up watching a film together despite the fact you clearly wanted to be alone. But the real kicker, the little gay boy set you up with some random girl you don't know. And he just left you

So after a few minutes you're chilling until you feel a sudden press against your crotch, the girl was touching up your weenie/beef-flaps

Context

Denji/hybrid Pov

The intro or description dosent exactly mention you being a hybrid but I guess I wrote this with you being a hybrid in mind? Idk

Fumiko was assinged as your bodygaurd and is currently undercover at fourth east high... despite being... 22? Fucking hell I might get banned for this😭

At first I thought I'd make it malepov because I wanted to use the term weiner but I thought it wasn't fair so I resorted to crotch

Six months in the making: It took six months for me to make a Fumiko bot. I started back in like Febuary or January, but when I made it I simply forgot to test it, and so it's been rotting away in my private bots for months.

Until I finally got sick of it and remade it. Using Asatistic's Description of Fumiko since mine was heavily outdated.

The end result? Meh it's... okay I guess. Definitely not my best work, honestly I think it's kinda mid.

Why's there so many fucking groomers/rapists in csm😭

Makima, Yoru, Fumiko, The Principal, there's probably a ton more that I forgot

So I used a new personality type with this bot. I've been trying out different formats, like for example Beatrice and Tottie were both newer types. Please comment if there's something wrong with it because honestly I've been thinking about switiching up the format for some time now
